details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and correct. All rubric requirements are met: (1) Both stepper.tsx files marked with 'use client' and export all 7 required sub-components, (2) Each component properly uses data-slot attributes (stepper, stepper-item, stepper-trigger, stepper-title, stepper-description, stepper-separator, stepper-content), (3) Both use cn() utility for class merging throughout, (4) Dual React context setup (StepperContext + StepperItemContext) with custom hooks (useStepper, useStepperItem) for state sharing, (5) Orientation support properly implemented with horizontal/vertical variants, (6) Demo examples show useState usage for active step management (stepper-example.tsx has comprehensive examples with multiple variations), (7) All 4 registry entries correctly added (stepper UI and stepper-example/stepper-demo examples), (8) No existing files modified. Minor note: radix version uses a custom icon-placeholder which is slightly unusual but functional within the shadcn environment. Code quality is high with consistent shadcn/ui patterns.
